title: pterocypsela indivisa
intro: Pterocypsela indivisa, also known as the annual pterocypsela, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pterocypsela indivisa has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Pterocypsela indivisa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual tolerance.
